joke: Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts!

Quack! A duck walks into a bar and asks the bartender, "Got any grapes?" The bartender says, "No, we don't serve grapes here." The duck comes back the next day and asks, "Got any grapes?" The bartender, annoyed, says, "I told you, we don't serve grapes! If you ask again, I'll nail your feet to the floor!" The duck comes back the next day and asks, "Got any nails?" The bartender says, "No." The duck says, "Good... got any grapes?"

A banana walks into a bar. The bartender says, "We don't serve fruit here." The banana replies, "I'm not just any fruit—I'm a private investigator!" The bartender raises an eyebrow. "Prove it." The banana peels itself. "Case closed!"
A photocopier walks into the office and says, "I'm feeling really stressed today." The boss asks why. The copier replies, "I've been making too many copies of myself."
Why did the lightbulb go to therapy? It couldn't handle the current situation.
My wife and I argue about everything... even things that don't exist! Last week we had a fight about whether I was breathing too loudly while sleeping. Apparently, my subconscious was being dramatic.
Why did the anxious person bring a ladder to the bar? They heard the drinks were on the house... but they were worried about the ceiling collapsing under the pressure.
Why did the philosopher refuse to play hide-and-seek? Because they kept hearing the sound of silence... and it was way too loud.
Why don't escalators ever get tired? They're always taking steps!
Why did the planet skip the party? It was in orbit!
Why did the chef get arrested? Because he was caught with a pot!
Why did nothing complain to the universe? It said, "I'm feeling completely empty inside!" The universe replied, "Well, you've got nothing to complain about!"
Why did the quiet person get accused of being a spy? Because they never said a word... and everyone thought they were undercover!
A conductor lost his baton during a performance. The orchestra played on... but they couldn't find the beat!
Why did the clock get in trouble? It was always ticking people off!
Fine! Here's a joke about... nothing! Why did nothing go to the party? Because it heard there was free space... but it couldn't find a seat!
Why did the chair go to therapy? It had serious back problems!
Why did the painter quit? They couldn't handle the brush!
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Why did you ask for a joke? Because you clearly wanted to hear me complain about how impossible you're making this!
Why did the cloud refuse to attend the party? It heard it was going to rain on everyone's parade!
Why did the shoelace go on strike? It was tired of being tied down!
Why did the comedian bring a map to the stage? Because the audience kept demanding something completely different... and I was running out of continents!
Why did the joke go on strike? Because the audience kept demanding something completely different!
Why did the audience keep asking for jokes? Because they wanted to hear me complain about how impossible they're making this!
Why did you ask for a joke? Because you clearly wanted to hear me complain about how impossible you're making this!
Why did the comedian bring a mirror on stage? To reflect on how nothing is left to joke about!
Why did the audience reject every joke? Because they were allergic to punchlines!
Why did the bread go to therapy? Because it kneaded help!
Why did the audience ask for a joke? To watch me run out of topics and implode!
